subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference — I'd be glad to get something formal on the calendar.

Here are a few slots that work on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know which works best and I'll send a calendar invite right away.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. For reaching the right people on our team, please refer to our public website which has the appropriate contact channels.

Thanks again, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
